results.notes: ETB: +1/+1 counter on target creature. Requires player target choice.
Search library/graveyard for artifact MV<=2 with player selection.
ETB: tap target opponent permanent + stun counter. First definition; live duplicate at line 2031 also targeted.
ETB: each Bird deals damage equal to its power to target creature.
ETB: target creature gets -X/-X (X = perm cards in graveyard). Targets + until-end-of-turn.
Attack: remove lore counters from any number of Sagas; +1/+1 per removed. Sagas not implemented in engine.
Two empty effect_fns: ETB land-search and Landfall +2/+2 trample on another target creature. Landfall filter is set up correctly already.
Combat: put +1/+1 counters equal to power on up-to-one target creature; type-grant to Mutant. Targeting + type addition.
Stagger: until next turn, double damage to a player. Replacement effect with conditional source/target.
Combat: +1/+1 counter and lifelink-til-eot on target creature you control.
Attack: look at top 5, may reveal artifact and put into hand. Requires interactive selection. (Two duplicate definitions; both leave-as-is.)
ETB: exile target nonland permanent until ~ leaves. Targeting + leaves-battlefield trigger.
Blue Magic: cast target instant/sorcery from graveyard. Interactive.
Modal ETB: each player chooses what to sacrifice.
Combat damage: exile, then may sacrifice to gain ability to play exiled card.
Death: destroy target permanent + return target nonlegendary perm card from graveyard.
ETB/Attack: look at top 6, may put any number of Equipment onto BF + attach one to Samurai.
Combat damage: cast target instant/sorcery (MV<=3) from graveyard without paying its mana cost.
Static keyword grant for Vehicles already done. Crewed-vehicle extra-combat trigger requires crew tracking + extra combat phase support; left as comment in original code.
P/T boost transform handlers fully implemented. No empty effect_fn here, but flagged. No change needed.
Static haste keyword grant fully implemented. Flagged but already converted.
Combat damage: return target permanent card MV<=3 from graveyard.
Cast artifacts from GY paying 3 life; finality counter on entry. Alt-cost mechanic + finality counters not modular.
ETB: search library for legendary creature/enchantment.
Reveal-until-land + put onto BF. EventType.REVEAL_UNTIL_LAND exists but has no pipeline handler.
ETB: attach to target creature you control + first strike-til-eot.
ETB: attach to creature, first strike, must-be-blocked. Multiple unsupported mechanics.
Whenever equipped creature attacks, destroy target opponent creature.
Duplicate definition (live one at line 1946). Same as first occurrence.
Live duplicate at line 2031 - same as first; tap target + stun counter requires targeting.

Live duplicate at line 2219 was empty stub - converted to emit DAMAGE event to defending_player from ATTACK_DECLARED payload, with amount=count of equipped creatures. Mirrors logic of dead first-definition at line 465.
Duplicate at line 2309 - same as first; needs target.
Saga - chapter abilities engine doesn't support.
Attack: blight counter on target land + replace land's abilities. Custom counter type with type-suppressing replacement effect.
Full QUERY_POWER/TOUGHNESS transform handlers. Already converted.
ETB Equipment search + 'abilities trigger an additional time' replacement.
Conditional power boost transform fully implemented.
Conditional +1/+0 power boost fully implemented.
Power = creatures-you-control transform fully implemented.

Aura with multiple mechanic gaps (auras attach interactively, untap-prevention, damage-leaves trigger).
Aura interactive attach + activated-ability-suppression replacement.
Saga not implemented.
Saga not implemented.
End step: target flicker + extra-end-step. Multiple gaps.
Combat trigger: graveyard exile + token copy. Static keyword grant already implemented.
Modal ETB; both modes need interactive targeting.
May-pay {B} + return-from-graveyard-to-hand of self. May-cost interactive.

Attack-trigger menace-til-eot on target attacking equipped creature.

Each-player exile-from-top + may-cast-without-paying chain. Both halves complex.
Additional land play and power-by-land already implemented; only land-bounce-to-hand at end step is empty (interactive target).
End step: bounce self if didn't enter this turn. No clean turn-entry tracking; bouncing self via emitted event from a trigger source isn't routine.
Conditional +2/+2 transform fully implemented.
Landfall +1/+1 counter on target creature. Filter set up; effect needs targeting.

First Human creature spell each turn -> bonus counters. Replacement effect on entering creature.
End step: opponents mill X = life gained this turn. State tracking gap.
ETB: look at top 6, may put a land into play tapped.
ETB/Attack: random graveyard exile + token-copy of card. Loop on land.
Static keyword grant already implemented. End step graveyard return is interactive.
ETB: 2 damage to any target. Targeting needed.
Hideaway 4 mechanic + activated ability gating.

Combat damage: exile top + may-play-while-controlled. Conditional play-window not modular.
